title: craspedia uniflora var. uniflora
intro: Craspedia uniflora var. uniflora, also known as the Billy Button or Woolly Heads, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe sore throats and reduce fever, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing. Craspedia uniflora var. uniflora can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and poultices, although its efficacy and safety as a medicinal plant require further research and validation.
